nodes.label: AI as ideation and outline partner
nodes.grounding_span: I will give the AI the topic of the interview...ask the AI to draft a list of questions for me

nodes.label: AI as research assistant with verification need
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully reliable research source
nodes.grounding_span: The AI sent over statistics very quickly, but upon double checking them for accuracy, many of them were not correct

nodes.label: AI use for tasks lacking personal excitement
nodes.label_negative: AI use for personally exciting creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it's a creative or writing task that I am excited about...I will tackle it myself instead of asking AI

nodes.label: Workplace pressure to adopt AI for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: My boss tends to use AI a lot, so I feel like I need to as well in order to stay efficient

nodes.label: Human connection in writing
nodes.grounding_span: ensuring that the writing I create always has a connection to the audience from a human perspective

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: If it's a creative or writing task that I am excited about...I will tackle it myself

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness
nodes.grounding_span: many of them were not correct and so I needed to do some additional research

nodes.label: Workplace efficiency and competitiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I need to as well in order to stay efficient and get my tasks completed quicker

nodes.label: Human connection and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: ensuring that the writing I create always has a connection to the audience from a human perspective

nodes.label: Satisfaction with collaborative AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate with it...ask for it to come with more that are similar to those

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracy
nodes.grounding_span: That was frustrating, especially since I doubt my boss or all of my colleagues are fact checking

nodes.label: Preference for human-led creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it's a creative or writing task that I am excited about...I will tackle it myself

nodes.label: Ambivalence about workplace pressure to use AI
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I need to as well in order to stay efficient

nodes.label: Curatorial selection — selects and refines AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I'll select the questions I like the most and think are the most relevant

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — double-checks AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: upon double checking them for accuracy
